hooks.command: f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if [ -n "$f" ]; then npx oxfmt "$f" || true; fi
npm run type-check && files=$(git diff --name-only --diff-filter=d HEAD | grep -E '\.(vue|ts|mjs|cjs|js)$' || true); if [ -n "$files" ]; then echo "$files" | xargs npx oxlint --deny-warnings; fi
